title: andryala integrifolia subsp. tenuifolia
intro: Andryala integrifolia subsp. tenuifolia, also known as the Andryala tenuifolia, is a plant species of the Andryala genus, which is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and acting as an antiseptic. Andryala integrifolia subsp. tenuifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction to utilize its medicinal properties.
